one_controller: crates/hawking-seed-c/src/state.rs (single transition table + append-only sealed log = drain/resume)
one_evidence_authority: crates/hawking-seed-c/src/record.rs (canonical JSON + sha256 seal) + evidence.rs receipts
one_hydration: pack.verify() offline (sha256 content-addressed); no download during a scientific run
one_registry: crates/hawking-seed-c/src/pack.rs + record.rs (capability->pack, content-address, active-set via sealed Records)
removed_competing_systems: the Seed's pack/record/state are the ONE verifier/registry/controller/evidence; legacy per-pack controllers/evidence are superseded (physical migration is the ongoing collapse, not faked)
topology_selected: A-monorepo (already one repo; no sibling repos exist so a seed+packs SPLIT is unjustified)
